debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

proof:
by
  obtain ⟨f, hf_inj, hf_surj⟩ := h
  use image f
  constructor
  · intro A B hAB
    apply Set.ext
    intro x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have : f x ∈ image f A := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rw [hAB] at this
      obtain ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩ := this
      have := hf_inj x y hfy.symm
      rw [this]; exact hy
    · intro hx
      have : f x ∈ image f B := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      rw [← hAB] at this
      obtain ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩ := this
      have := hf_inj x y hfy.symm
      rw [this]; exact hy
  · intro B
    use {x : U | f x ∈ B}
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx, hfx⟩
      rw [← hfx]; exact hx
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, hfx⟩ := hf_surj y
      exact ⟨x, show f x ∈ B by rw [hfx]; exact hy, hfx⟩
successful_attempts:
by

  use image f

      rw [this]; exact hy
    · intro hx

      rw [← hAB] at this
      obtain ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩ := this

  · intro B

    · intro hy
